file: 1416_Sun 等 - 2020 - Supported heteropolyacids catalysts for the selective hydrocracking and isomerization of n-C16 to pr.txt

experiments.reaction_type: 加氢裂化和异构化反应
experiments.description: 以正十六烷（n-C16）为模型反应物，在固定床反应器中，使用Pt/HPA/MCM-41双功能催化剂，在340°C、1.0 MPa氢气压力下进行选择性加氢裂化和异构化反应，以生产碳数为9-15的喷气燃料。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydrocracking and isomerization of n-C16 were carried out in a fixed-bed reactor. In a typical run, 1.81g catalyst (40–60 mesh) was packed between two piles of quartz sand in the reaction tube, subsequently reduced at an H2 flow rate of 150 mL/min, 1.0 MPa, 350°C for 2h. Thereafter the reactor was cooled down to 340°C and the H2 flow rate was adjusted to 32 mL/min. The liquid raw material of n-C16 in a buffer tank enters the reaction tube through a pump at a flow rate of 0.04 mL/min (WHSV=1 h−1).

Flow rate.original: 0.04 mL/min (n-C16 flow rate), 32 mL/min (H2 flow rate)

Product yield.original: ≈20 wt.% (jet fuel yield over Pt/40wt.% HPMo/MCM-41)
